CE Fall/Winter New TEEN LOLA Logo Print Handbag👜.
Another masterpiece from the Triumph family, Teen Lola is here. TRIO MPHE magnetic closure, 1 interior compartment, 1 interior flat pocket, detachable and adjustable long shoulder strap. The bag exudes ultimate French elegance and can easily hold a phone, compact powder, lipstick, card holder, and other daily essentials! Not only is it small, exquisite, and cute, but it can also be carried by hand, crossbody, or over the shoulder for various looks🫶🏻
Style: 119533
Color: White (with original packaging)
Size: 20x11.5x5cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
💖 🆕 Goyard Alto Round Box Bag is also a Hat Box Bag 🎩
Alto bag is a highly representative classic hat box bag that combines the essence of Goyard's box-making craftsmanship: Poplar wooden frame, round calfskin handle, closure buckle system, and iconic yellow lining. While appearing small, it has amazing capacity, can hold a mobile phone 📱 keys 🔑 lipstick 💄 small leather goods and other daily items.
The strap is adjustable and detachable, elegant for hand-carry, stylish for shoulder carry, super A and eye-catching 😍
Size: 18*16.5*7cm
🔍020216

Shoulder tote - a lunch bag you can just grab and go. Made with classic intrecciato weaving, embodying Bottega's artisan spirit. The entire body is crafted from top-tier Happa lambskin, very soft, lightweight, and the small shape is cute and exquisite. The interior capacity is also sufficient; it can be carried by hand or under the arm, quite practical! The bottom features a gold metal base to prevent wear. The details are really spot on! The elegant commuter bag for early risers is the one to choose. 3002 Dimensions: 22x13x9.5

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
SERPENTI FOREVER Medium Tote, made of calf leather with sheepskin lining. It skillfully blends classic design with modern style, fully showcasing the endless charm of the collection. This easy-to-wear bag incorporates new details into iconic elements, featuring a leather shoulder strap and a signature snake-head magnetic clasp. Its enchanting scales and design draw inspiration from the 1960s SERPENTI jewelry collection. It features a compartment, a front pocket, an external back zip pocket, an internal open pocket, and a mirror pouch with a customizable mirror. The back is adorned with a BVLGARI metal logo.
Style: 293665
Size: 20.5 X 15 X 9

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New Arrival ❤️ Woven Small Square Bag
Most existing styles are a bit trendy
and a bit hard to style
So I picked this one!
This small square bag is similar to the Cloud Bag in small size
But! It is lighter than the Cloud Bag and has much more capacity
This is a little cutie that crosses all age groups
I like it, Mom likes it, and even Grandma will like it!
And the large woven pattern won't look old-fashioned~
As someone who is half a fashionista, I think
this is a very excellent small bag!
Specially bought a ZP to develop
Model 3001S Size 22*15*8cm

💝🔔 New Upgrade🔔 Comes with bag charm clip 🎀➕ Gift box 🎁➕ Upgraded manual 💌
❤️Goyard (Goyard) has undergone multiple research and improvements, constantly upgrading the fabric and leather. Exclusive customization TM️ is only to constantly meet customers' high-quality requirements 🔝🔝
The base fabric uses high-quality custom rain-dyed hemp consistent with ZP 〽️, coated with glossy shellac [Witty] The grain texture rivals ZP, achieving a look that is both glossy and matte 🤟 The leather is top-grain calfskin 👛🤘 Flexible and not prickly 💪🤓 Matching symmetrical patterns, pure colors with no color difference 😘 Check details in the pictures [Bow] [Bow]
Size: Opening 28cm, Base 20*Height 20*Base Width 10cm
🔎020660
